Work

    Process

    Style & generation

    Midjourney style profiles and custom prompts drive the base image. Each series (Fragment, Dark Romantics, Liminal Spaces) has a defined visual language—baroque detail, chromatic restraint, and compositional tension.

    Animation & motion

    Kling, Veo, Sora, and Wan feed the animation pipeline. Frames are chosen for baroque detail protection: preserving fine linework and texture while introducing motion. The goal is cinematic movement without flattening the image.

    Detail protection

    Baroque-influenced work demands that ornament and shadow survive upscaling and interpolation. Custom workflows protect edges, contrast, and fine detail across still and moving outputs.
